Not every book of the Bible contains an outline in the beginning of the book, but this one does. And we find here in Revelation one, in verse number 19, he says, write the things which thou hast seen and the things which are and the things which shall be hereafter. And so we find in this verse of Scripture that God provides the three sections, if you will, of the book of Revelation and provides for us an outline at the very beginning of this book. Revelation chapter number one is that first section of the book of Revelation, the things which thou hast seen. Then he says, and the things which are.
